docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EK, VICTOR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-29-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AS PER ORDER OF 07/07/04.

- BEG. ON 7/20/04 & ON THE 20TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNITL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT EK, VICTOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARED TO SHOW HIS LAST PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
